revision.comment: Reverted edits by [[Special:Contribs/2.147.130.96|2.147.130.96]] ([[User talk:2.147.130.96|talk]]) to last version by Andrybak

revision.text: {{Userbox |id = [[File:Cube.svg|40px]] |info = This is an example of a template. For help with templates, see [[Help:Template]]. }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude> [[Category:New]]

revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates.
Text replacement - "{{draft categories|" to "<noinclude> {{Draft categories| [[Category:templates with draft categories]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:templates with draft categories fixed]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:templates with draft categories fixed 3]]</noinclude>"

revision.text:
{{Userbox |id = [[File:Cube.svg|40px]] |info = This is an example of a template. For help with templates, see [[Help:Template]]. }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>
<noinclude> <noinclude>\n<noinclude>{{Draft categories| [[Category:templates with draft categories]] }}</noinclude> \n</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23410164509|commit triggered pipeline]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Example here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Example for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{Userbox |id = [[File:Cube.svg|40px]] |info = This is an example of a template. For help with templates, see [[Help:Template]]. }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude>
<noinclude> <noinclude>\n \n [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
